name: [BUG-SF-006] TC-SF-012 — GET /api/v1/fetch/trigger: Must return 405 Method Not Allowed (returns 500)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-006]**

**What this test does:**
Sends a GET request to /api/v1/fetch/trigger (a POST-only endpoint) and verifies the server returns 405 Method Not Allowed.

**Expected:** HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed with Allow: POST header
**Actual:** HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

**Root Cause:** Same as BUG-SF-005 — unhandled MethodNotAllowedException produces 500.

**Common scenario where this occurs:** A developer calls GET /fetch/trigger expecting to see the trigger status or last-run time. Instead they get a confusing 500 with no indication that they used the wrong HTTP method.
